title: Test vehicle components for correct operation
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Test vehicle components for correct operation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to test components

pcs.text: Determine job requirements and units and components to be tested from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret task information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for safe and required operation1.5 Plan work to identify disassembly and testing methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements and units and components to be tested from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret task information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for safe and required operation1.5 Plan work to identify disassembly and testing methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements and units and components to be tested from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret task information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for safe and required operation1.5 Plan work to identify disassembly and testing methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to test components

elements.title: Disassemble components

pcs.text: Disassemble components according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Check disassembled components for damage or wear against manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Disassemble components according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Check disassembled components for damage or wear against manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Disassemble components according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Check disassembled components for damage or wear against manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Disassemble components

elements.title: Clean components

pcs.text: Determine cleaning procedure from manufacturer specifications, safety data sheets (SDS), and workplace procedures3.2 Clean components using approved cleaning products, materials and equipment according to safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine cleaning procedure from manufacturer specifications, safety data sheets (SDS), and workplace procedures3.2 Clean components using approved cleaning products, materials and equipment according to safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine cleaning procedure from manufacturer specifications, safety data sheets (SDS), and workplace procedures3.2 Clean components using approved cleaning products, materials and equipment according to safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Clean components

elements.title: Test components

pcs.text: Test component to determine required operation and quality standard4.2 Determine repair or replacement of component according to test results and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test component to determine required operation and quality standard4.2 Determine repair or replacement of component according to test results and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test component to determine required operation and quality standard4.2 Determine repair or replacement of component according to test results and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Test components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
